title: Lucy
tmdbOverview: A woman, accidentally caught in a dark deal, turns the tables on her captors and transforms into a merciless warrior evolved beyond human logic.
synopsis: Lucy is a 2014 action and science fiction film from France. It carries a 6.4 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2010s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
